## Summary

Explain the user-visible change and why it belongs in Syncorda.

## Validation

- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] `swift run syncordachecks`
- [ ] Release bundle built when packaging changed
- [ ] Hardware check performed, or not applicable

## Audio and privacy impact

Describe any change to real-time callbacks, Core Audio permissions, local socket access, profile persistence, logging, or device compatibility.
